overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in dark robes walking through a snowy gothic castle courtyard at dusk. The character ascends grand stone staircases and moves through torch-lit archways while other robed figures walk through the medieval architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy courtyard toward the castle main building

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking ahead toward the castle entrance
student in dark robes passing by on the left side

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires and snow-covered rooftops
lit stone lanterns lining both sides of the courtyard path
circular stone pattern embedded in the snow-covered courtyard floor
snow-covered mountains visible in the distance against the purple sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy courtyard at dusk, with a massive gothic castle looming ahead. The camera follows a robed character walking toward the castle entrance, passing other students and lit stone lanterns. The ground features a distinctive circular stone pattern, and snow-covered mountains are visible in the background under a deep purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase leading to upper castle level

events.description: begins ascending the wide grand staircase toward the castle entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the snow-dusted stone steps alongside other robed figures

notable_agents.action: group of students ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with snow-covered steps leading up to the castle
tall cylindrical tower with conical roof on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the flat courtyard to ascending a grand stone staircase. The camera tilts upward to reveal the castle tower on the right as the climb progresses. Other students are visible ahead on the stairs, and the main castle facade draws closer with each step.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gothic walkway and cloister courtyard

events.description: enters dark covered archway with dramatic shift to low torchlight
exits the dark archway into the open cloister courtyard with gothic pillars

agents.ego_description: passing through the covered walkway and emerging into the inner cloister courtyard

notable_agents.action: distant robed figure walking through the archway ahead

entered.detail: dark stone archway with gothic tracery leading into the castle interior
tall stone pillars with pointed arches forming a covered walkway
open courtyard surrounded by gothic arcades and cloister walkways

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters a dramatically darker covered archway, transitioning from the purple dusk to torch-lit shadows. After passing through the tunnel-like passage, the scene opens into a cloister courtyard surrounded by gothic pillars and arched walkways. The architecture features intricate stone tracery and the ground remains covered in snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, snowy courtyard at dusk into the torch-lit depths of a gothic castle's interior. It begins by following a robed character across a circular stone plaza under a deep purple sky, passing lit lanterns and other students with snow-covered mountains looming in the distance. As the character moves forward, the camera tilts upward to track the ascent of a grand stone staircase, bringing the massive castle facade and a towering spire into closer view. The scene then shifts from the open air into a dramatically darker covered archway, where the purple twilight gives way to the flickering glow of torches. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel-like passage to reveal a secluded cloister courtyard defined by intricate stone tracery and arched walkways standing over a blanket of snow.
